mapper.sql: select a.advice_id, a.target_type, a.target_id, a.advice_type, a.title, a.content_md, a.content_json, a.evidence_json, a.risk_level, a.confidence, a.status, a.review_by, a.review_time, a.review_note, a.valid_from, a.valid_to, a.ai_provider, a.ai_model, a.prompt_version, a.linked_work_order_id, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, p.plant_name, ar.area_name from garden_care_advice a left join garden_plant p on a.target_type = 'PLANT' and p.plant_id = a.target_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join garden_area ar on ar.area_id = p.area_id and ar.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: where a.target_type = #{param1} and a.target_id = #{param2} and a.status = '2' order by a.review_time desc, a.advice_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into garden_care_advice( target_type, target_id, advice_type, title, content_md, content_json, evidence_json, risk_level, confidence, status, ai_provider, ai_model, prompt_version, linked_work_order_id, valid_from, valid_to, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{adviceType}, #{title}, #{contentMd}, #{contentJson}, #{evidenceJson}, #{riskLevel}, #{confidence}, #{status}, #{aiProvider}, #{aiModel}, #{promptVersion}, #{linkedWorkOrderId}, #{validFrom}, #{validTo}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.delete:
delete from garden_care_advice where advice_id in
#{adviceId}
